summary: Comprehensive testing of new trading engine features: 74 engines, auto-compounding position sizing, toggle-trade endpoint, super bot multiplier. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Engine type breakdown: 24 market + 24 coin + 2 scalper + 24 bot = 74
compounded_position_size equals max(5, kitty * 0.05) - verified with kitty=$50.09, size=$5
PUT /api/engines/bot_01/toggle-trade with {enabled: false} returns trade_enabled: false
PUT /api/engines/bot_01/toggle-trade with {enabled: true} returns trade_enabled: true
toggle-trade state persists and appears in engine summary
Bot engines include super_bot_multiplier field (1, 2, or 3)
BTC and ETH scalper engines exist with type='scalper'

bots_tab.description: Bots tab shows 26 engines (2 crypto scalpers + 24 exchange bots)

toggle_buttons.description: Each bot row has an ON/OFF toggle button that works

bots_summary_bar.description: Shows TOTAL 26, TRADING count, ENABLED count, W/L, P&L, SIZE $5 (10%)

topbar_position_size.description: TopBar shows SIZE $5 auto SWING (auto-compounded position size)

section_headers.description: Two sections visible: 'Crypto Scalpers' (2) and 'Exchange Scalper Bots' (24)

seed_data_creation: None - system uses live WebSocket data from backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly. Key implementation details: (1) 74 engines total: 24 market + 24 coin + 2 crypto scalpers + 24 exchange bots, (2) Auto-compounding: compute_position_size() returns max(5, kitty * 0.05), (3) Toggle-trade: PUT /api/engines/{id}/toggle-trade with {enabled: bool}, (4) Engine summary includes trade_enabled and super_bot_multiplier fields, (5) Frontend Bots tab shows 26 engines with toggle buttons, summary bar, and two sections (Crypto Scalpers, Exchange Scalper Bots), (6) TopBar shows auto-compounded position size with 'auto' indicator.

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/engines/summary: Returns all 74 engine summaries with trade_enabled, super_bot_multiplier
api_endpoints_tested.PUT /api/engines/{id}/toggle-trade: Toggles trade_enabled for a specific engine

features_verified_summary.auto_compounding: ✅ WORKING - max(5, kitty * 0.05), currently $5 with kitty ~$50
features_verified_summary.toggle_trade: ✅ WORKING - PUT endpoint toggles trade_enabled, persists in summary
features_verified_summary.super_bot_multiplier: ✅ WORKING - Field present in all bot engine summaries (1/2/3)
features_verified_summary.bots_tab_26_engines: ✅ WORKING - Shows 2 crypto scalpers + 24 exchange bots
features_verified_summary.toggle_buttons_ui: ✅ WORKING - Each bot row has ON/OFF toggle
features_verified_summary.bots_summary_bar: ✅ WORKING - Shows total, trading, enabled, W/L, P&L, position size
features_verified_summary.two_sections: ✅ WORKING - Crypto Scalpers and Exchange Scalper Bots sections visible
